questions.leftDesc: Jump in shouting 'You're it!' and lead the chase.
questions.rightDesc: Sneak off to plan the perfect secret fort.

questions.leftDesc: Mash all buttons to see what explosions happen.
questions.rightDesc: Watch the full tutorial before your first try.

questions.leftDesc: Soar through clouds racing birds across the sky.
questions.rightDesc: Read your pet's mind to solve their mysteries.

questions.prompt: Friend is sad—how do you help?
questions.leftDesc: Make silly faces and dance until they laugh.
questions.rightDesc: Sit close and give a gentle silent hug.

questions.leftDesc: Know every game and guest ahead of time.
questions.rightDesc: Walk in ready for surprising fun discoveries.

questions.leftDesc: Grab the marker and assign everyone their jobs.
questions.rightDesc: Let teammates pick while you help anywhere needed.

questions.prompt: Recess bell rings—where do you go?
questions.leftDesc: Run to the big game with all the kids.
questions.rightDesc: Find your bestie for secrets and inside jokes.

questions.prompt: New LEGO set—how do you build?
questions.leftDesc: Follow each step to match the box perfectly.
questions.rightDesc: Dump pieces out and create your own invention.

questions.leftDesc: Try that weird blue swirl nobody understands.
questions.rightDesc: Get your trusted favorite that never disappoints.

questions.leftDesc: Center stage with spotlight performing for the crowd.
questions.rightDesc: Backstage running the tech booth and cueing perfect moments.

questions.prompt: Big assignment due—when do you start?
questions.leftDesc: Pull an all-nighter powered by last-minute panic.
questions.rightDesc: Start weeks early with a stress-free color-coded plan.

questions.leftDesc: Step in as peacemaker to fix the misunderstanding.
questions.rightDesc: Stay completely out until the storm passes.

questions.prompt: You bombed a test—how do you cope?
questions.leftDesc: Shake it off—one bad grade won't define you.
questions.rightDesc: Replay every wrong answer in your head for days.

questions.leftDesc: Volunteer first to get it over with fast.
questions.rightDesc: Handle slides while your partner does the talking.

questions.leftDesc: Steady paycheck and clear career path ahead.
questions.rightDesc: Chase what excites you even with bigger risks.

questions.leftDesc: Schedule a meeting to argue your case point-by-point.
questions.rightDesc: Accept it to avoid awkward confrontation or grudges.

questions.leftDesc: Create a color-coded calendar with every subject blocked.
questions.rightDesc: Wing it based on vibes the night before each.

questions.leftDesc: Pump everyone up with an epic team huddle speech.
questions.rightDesc: Draw the winning play on the whiteboard quietly.

questions.prompt: First day at new school—your approach?
questions.leftDesc: Introduce yourself to everyone and make lunch plans.
questions.rightDesc: Observe the social scene for a week first.

questions.leftDesc: Backpack solo through hostels meeting interesting new strangers everywhere.
questions.rightDesc: Road trip with your squad sharing every moment.

questions.prompt: New work project lands—your first step?
questions.leftDesc: Dive in fast, iterating and fixing as you go.
questions.rightDesc: Map out every requirement and milestone before action.

questions.leftDesc: Work the room collecting cards from everyone possible.
questions.rightDesc: Find one interesting person for a real conversation.

questions.leftDesc: Corporate ladder with clear promotions and benefits.
questions.rightDesc: Startup gamble with equity and chance to build.

questions.leftDesc: Analyze feedback objectively while keeping emotions separate.
questions.rightDesc: Feel the sting first before thinking about next steps.

questions.leftDesc: Create detailed itinerary with every restaurant and train.
questions.rightDesc: Book the flight only, figure out the rest there.

questions.prompt: Roommate tension brewing—how do you handle it?
questions.leftDesc: Have the direct awkward conversation to clear the air.
questions.rightDesc: Leave passive-aggressive notes hoping they get it.

questions.leftDesc: Experiment with a wild untested idea for big upside.
questions.rightDesc: Stick to proven models that safely minimize the risk.

questions.leftDesc: Hit the group chat, FOMO-fueled and ready to rally.
questions.rightDesc: Decline everything guilt-free, couch and shows calling.

questions.leftDesc: Inbox zero—every email sorted within 24 hours.
questions.rightDesc: 10,000 unread but somehow still fully functioning.

questions.leftDesc: Haggle hard with comparable listings, willing to walk.
questions.rightDesc: Just pay listed price to avoid the hassle.

questions.prompt: Life philosophy at this stage—what guides you?
questions.leftDesc: Maximize experiences now while you're still healthy.
questions.rightDesc: Build lasting legacy and foundations for the future.

questions.leftDesc: Address it formally in a meeting with documentation.
questions.rightDesc: Suggest casual coffee chat to build rapport first.

questions.leftDesc: Keep climbing the ladder you've built for years.
questions.rightDesc: Pivot to your true calling even starting over.

questions.leftDesc: Max out retirement contributions for that sweet compound magic.
questions.rightDesc: Splurge on something you've wanted forever now.

questions.leftDesc: Approach logically identifying the core issue first.
questions.rightDesc: Reconnect emotionally so you both feel heard.

questions.prompt: Major life decision ahead—how do you decide?
questions.leftDesc: Trust gut instincts built from decades of experience.
questions.rightDesc: Deep-dive research with spreadsheets and expert consults.

questions.leftDesc: Power through the quarter—the project can't wait.
questions.rightDesc: Take mental health days now for sustainable performance.

questions.prompt: Want to learn something new—your method?
questions.leftDesc: YouTube university at your own pace when motivated.
questions.rightDesc: Sign up for a structured course with clear deadlines.

questions.leftDesc: Host and curate every detail of the entire evening.
questions.rightDesc: Attend as guest enjoying food without any stress.

questions.prompt: Life throws a major curveball—your instinct?
questions.leftDesc: Lean into chaos as opportunity to reinvent everything.
questions.rightDesc: Anchor down to protect what you've carefully built.
